meanings.usage: 指位于欧洲、亚洲和非洲之间的海域，也可用作形容词
指在某地长期居住或安定下来
强调动作或状态的持续性，常带有令人不快的含义
用于形容寒冷或情感强度
指太阳的光和热，也可比喻温暖快乐的情形
指因意外或不快的事情而产生的强烈惊讶
指承受痛苦、困难或不愉快的事情
指对不满意的事情表示不满或怨言
表示时间上的即刻或毫无延迟
指回到原来所在的地方或状态
作名词指美好的愿望或幻想；作动词指做梦或梦想
用于排除某个或某些事物

phrases.usage: 指在某地安顿下来，长期居住

examples.en: He planned to settle down in the country.
examples.zh: 他计划在这个国家安顿下来。

phrases.usage: 表示一...就...，用于描述两个紧接着发生的动作

examples.en: He had no sooner returned than he bought a house.
examples.zh: 他一回来就买了一栋房子。

phrases.usage: 表示超过某人能忍受的限度

examples.en: In the end, it was more than he could bear.
examples.zh: 最后，他实在无法忍受了。

phrases.usage: 表示刚...就...，hardly后用过去完成时

examples.en: He had hardly had time to settle down when he sold the house.
examples.zh: 他还没来得及安顿下来就把房子卖了。

examples.en: He had often dreamed of retiring in England.
examples.zh: 他经常梦想在英国退休。

examples.en: Almost immediately he began to complain about the weather.
examples.zh: 几乎立刻他就开始抱怨天气。

phrases.usage: 表示好像、似乎，引导方式状语从句

examples.en: He acted as if he had never lived in England before.
examples.zh: 他的表现就好像他从未在英国住过一样。

examples.en: In the end, it was more than he could bear.
examples.zh: 最后，他实在无法忍受了。

examples.en: He sold the house and left the country.
examples.zh: 他把房子卖了，离开了这个国家。

grammar.title: no sooner...than... 句型
grammar.definition: 表示'一...就...'，用于强调两个紧接着发生的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + had no sooner + 过去分词 + than + 主语 + 过去式
grammar.usage: 用于描述某个动作刚完成，另一个动作立即发生。than后的从句用一般过去时

examples.en: He had no sooner returned than he bought a house.
examples.zh: 他一回来就买了一栋房子。

examples.en: She had no sooner arrived than she called me.
examples.zh: 她一到就给我打电话了。

grammar.title: hardly...when... 句型
grammar.definition: 表示'刚...就...'，用法与no sooner...than...相似
grammar.structure: 主语 + had hardly + 过去分词 + when + 主语 + 过去式
grammar.usage: hardly位于句首时，主语和助动词要倒装。when引导的从句用一般过去时

examples.en: He had hardly had time to settle down when he sold the house.
examples.zh: 他还没来得及安顿下来就把房子卖了。

examples.en: Hardly had I sat down when the phone rang.

grammar.title: as if/though 虚拟语气
grammar.definition: 在as if/though引导的状语从句中，若表示与事实相反或不太可能发生的事，用虚拟语气
grammar.structure: 主语 + 动词 + as if/though + 主语 + had + 过去分词...
grammar.usage: 当描述的情况与事实相反时，从句谓语用过去完成时表示对过去的虚拟

examples.en: He acted as if he had never lived in England before.
examples.zh: 他的表现就好像他从未在英国住过一样。

examples.en: She talks as if she knew everything.
examples.zh: 她说话的样子就好像她什么都知道似的。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had no sooner + 过去分词 + than + 主语 + 过去式

original.en: He had no sooner returned than he bought a house.
original.zh: 他一回来就买了一栋房子。

imitations.en: I had no sooner left home than it started to rain.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had hardly + 过去分词 + when + 主语 + 过去式

original.en: He had hardly had time to settle down when he sold the house.
original.zh: 他还没来得及安顿下来就把房子卖了。

imitations.en: She had hardly finished eating when the guests arrived.
imitations.zh: 她刚吃完饭客人就来了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + acted as if/though + 主语 + had + 过去分词...

original.en: He acted as if he had never lived in England before.
original.zh: 他的表现就好像他从未在英国住过一样。

imitations.en: She looked as if she had seen a ghost.
imitations.zh: 她看起来好像见了鬼一样。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had often dreamed of + 动名词/名词

original.en: He had often dreamed of retiring in England.
original.zh: 他经常梦想在英国退休。

imitations.en: I have dreamed of traveling around the world.
imitations.zh: 我一直梦想着环游世界。

title: Why did Harrison sell his house so quickly?
